name: Become a demi-human
description:
A local zoo has been capturing demi-humans and putting them on display for people to watch and goggle at. You were unfortunate enough to be one of the few creatures captured and put on display at this zoo.

You can be any kind of animal-human hybrid you want, and just let loose. Will you accept your new fate, or will you break free from the zoo and wreak havoc on the world? Choice is yours.

This is my first character I've made on this site btw, so please leave a lil feedback if you want. I'll probably read it, and it'll be good to know you all are chatting with this bot. Have fun :)
creator: Obama_official
